zone.description: The zone in which the cache instance needs to be created. For example, `us-central1-a.`
zone.rationale: Zone location need to be set in Aus regions for data sovereignty purposes

bucket.rationale: Bucket name is required field and does not relate to security

admission_policy.description: The cache admission policy dictates whether a block should be inserted upon a cache miss. Default value is `admit-on-first-miss`. Possible values are: `admit-on-first-miss`, `admit-on-second-miss`.

ttl.description: The TTL of all cache entries in whole seconds. e.g., "7200s". It defaults to `86400s`
ttl.rationale: TTL of cache entries is not security related
